description: Liquid pooling beneath pipe flanges, valves, or fittings indicating active leak
visual_signals: liquid puddle forming beneath pipe flange connection
dripping fluid from valve body packing gland or bonnet
wet spot spreading under pipe fitting or union joint

description: Staining or discoloration from weeping leak on pipe exterior or equipment surface
visual_signals: dark streak running down from leaking flange bolt
discolored residue trail below valve stem packing
dried crystalline or oily deposit pattern indicating slow seepage

description: Hydrocarbon sheen visible on water surfaces in drainage ditches, sumps, or containment areas
visual_signals: rainbow oil sheen on standing water in ditch or sump
iridescent film floating on drainage channel surface
oily discoloration on water in catch basin or containment

description: Visible steam or vapor release from unintended source such as leaking gasket, cracked weld, or open vent
visual_signals: steam plume escaping from pipe joint or flange gasket
vapor cloud at unexpected location on process equipment
wispy emission from equipment casing crack or weld seam

description: External pipe corrosion with visible rust, pitting, or wall thinning on uninsulated piping
visual_signals: orange-brown rust patches on bare pipe exterior surface
pitting craters visible on uninsulated pipe wall
flaking corroded scale on exposed pipe run

description: Corrosion under insulation (CUI) indicators — damaged insulation jacketing with rust weeping or staining at seams
visual_signals: rust-colored staining bleeding through insulation jacket seam
torn aluminum cladding with visible corrosion product beneath
brown weeping at insulation termination points or band clamps

description: Missing insulation cladding sections exposing pipe insulation material to weather and moisture ingress
visual_signals: bare insulation material exposed where metal jacketing is absent
section of pipe with aluminum cladding torn away revealing underlayer
gap in insulation covering exposing mineral wool or calcium silicate

description: Structural steel corrosion on pipe supports, platforms, or building frames compromising load capacity
visual_signals: heavy rust and section loss on structural I-beam or column
corrosion flaking on pipe support bracket or shoe
pitting and thickness loss visible on steel grating support members

description: Vessel or tank showing visible deformation such as bulging, denting, or shell distortion
visual_signals: outward bulge or deformation on pressure vessel shell
dent or impact damage visible on storage tank wall
waviness or distortion on vessel surface indicating overpressure

description: Scaffolding missing toe boards or guardrails creating fall and dropped-object hazards
visual_signals: scaffold platform edge without toe board allowing tool drop
missing mid-rail or top-rail on scaffold at elevation
open side of scaffold without complete guardrail system

description: Scaffolding erected without current inspection tag or color-coded tag indicating it has not been certified for use
visual_signals: scaffold with no inspection tag visible at access point
red or expired-color tag on scaffold indicating not certified
scaffold access ladder without competent-person certification tag

description: Damaged or missing platform grating on walkways, mezzanines, or elevated structures
visual_signals: section of steel grating missing from elevated walkway
bent or broken grating panel creating fall-through opening
hole in floor grating on platform exposing level below

description: Fixed ladder missing handrails, safety cage, or climb-assist system where required
visual_signals: vertical fixed ladder without side rails extending above landing
fixed ladder above 24 feet without safety cage or fall arrest
ladder rungs at top without grab bars for safe transition to platform

description: Worker in process area without hard hat
visual_signals: person walking in refinery unit with uncovered head
worker near overhead piping without hard hat visible
individual in process area among helmeted crew without head protection

description: Worker in process area without safety glasses or required eye protection
visual_signals: person in plant area without safety glasses on face
worker near chemical handling without eye protection visible
individual in process zone with no safety eyewear

description: Worker in process area without flame-resistant (FR) coveralls or clothing
visual_signals: person wearing non-FR street clothes or synthetic fabric in unit
worker in t-shirt near hydrocarbon process equipment
individual without FR coveralls in operating unit area

description: Worker at height without fall protection harness and tie-off where required above 6 feet
visual_signals: person on elevated platform or structure without visible harness
worker climbing tower or column with no lanyard attached
individual at height with harness unbuckled or lanyard hanging free

description: Fire extinguisher missing from designated location in process area
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher cabinet or wall bracket in process unit
extinguisher sign posted with no unit present at location
fire extinguisher station with vacant mounting position

description: Emergency shower or eyewash station access obstructed by equipment, materials, or vegetation
visual_signals: equipment or materials stacked blocking path to emergency shower
vegetation overgrowth obscuring emergency eyewash station
pallets or drums placed within clear zone of safety shower

description: Wind sock missing, torn, or non-functional preventing wind direction assessment for toxic release response
visual_signals: empty wind sock pole with no sock or tattered remnant
shredded wind sock fabric hanging from mast
wind sock tangled around pole and non-functional

description: Safety signage missing, illegible, or damaged at hazardous area classification boundaries or process equipment
visual_signals: faded or unreadable hazard sign at area classification boundary
sign post with no placard attached at unit entrance
damaged area classification sign with missing information

description: Secondary containment structure showing cracks, deterioration, or compromised integrity
visual_signals: visible crack running through concrete containment dike wall
spalling and exposed rebar in secondary containment berm
gap or hole in containment liner allowing potential seepage

description: Secondary containment drain valve found in open position allowing uncontrolled release of accumulated liquids
visual_signals: drain valve handle in open position on containment wall
liquid actively draining from containment through open valve
unlocked drain valve at base of dike in open position

description: Oily rags, debris, or combustible waste materials left on walkways or near process equipment
visual_signals: oily rags left on grating or platform walkway surface
debris and waste scattered on process unit platform
combustible materials left near hot equipment or ignition sources

description: P&ID or process flow diagram not posted or accessible at process unit — process safety information not available to operators per 29 CFR 1910.119
visual_signals: process unit control area without posted P&ID diagram
operator station lacking visible process flow diagram on wall
empty document holder where P&ID or process drawing should be posted

description: Operating procedures not accessible — standard operating procedures binder or station missing or empty at operator post per PSM requirements
visual_signals: empty procedure binder holder at unit operator station
operating procedure cabinet open with no documents inside
control room desk without visible SOP manual or procedure access

description: Hot work permit not posted — welding, cutting, or grinding in process area without visible hot work permit posted at work location
visual_signals: welding or cutting in progress in process area with no permit posted
hot work activity near process equipment without visible permit board
grinding sparks near piping with no hot work authorization sign

description: Hot work fire watch missing — welding or cutting in refinery without dedicated fire watch person present within line of sight
visual_signals: welder working alone in process area with no fire watch attendant
cutting torch in use near equipment with no second person watching
hot work in progress with no person standing by with extinguisher

description: Hot work fire blanket not deployed — welding or cutting near cable trays, insulation, or combustibles without fire-resistant blanket protection
visual_signals: sparks falling on cable tray below welding with no fire blanket
torch cutting near insulated piping without protective blanket draped
grinding near combustible material without fire blanket shielding

description: Confined space entry without visible permit and danger signage — entry into vessel, tank, or enclosed space without posted permit per 1910.146
visual_signals: manway or vessel entry open with no confined space permit posted
worker entering tank through manhole without danger sign visible
confined space entry in progress with no permit board at opening

description: Confined space atmospheric testing equipment absent — no gas detector or four-gas monitor visible at confined space entry point
visual_signals: confined space entry with no gas monitor or detector at opening
vessel entry in progress with no atmospheric testing instrument visible
manway opening without portable gas detector stationed nearby

description: Confined space rescue tripod missing — vertical confined space entry without rescue tripod, davit, or mechanical retrieval system set up
visual_signals: vertical vessel entry without rescue tripod set up over opening
manhole entry in progress with no davit arm or retrieval winch
confined space opening without rescue equipment staged at surface

description: Confined space attendant not present — no dedicated standby person visible at confined space entry while workers are inside
visual_signals: open confined space entry point with no attendant stationed outside
vessel manway open with signs of entry but no watch person present
confined space hole cover removed with no person monitoring at opening

description: Floating roof tank seal deterioration — visible gaps, tears, or displacement in floating roof rim seal allowing vapor escape
visual_signals: visible gap between floating roof rim and tank shell wall
torn or displaced seal fabric on floating roof edge
vapor shimmer rising from gap in floating roof seal area

description: Tank foam system deficiency — foam chamber or piping on storage tank showing corrosion, damage, or missing components
visual_signals: corroded foam chamber mounted on tank shell with deterioration
foam line piping disconnected or missing section on tank
damaged foam pourpoint or deflector on rim of storage tank

description: Tank vent or pressure-vacuum valve deficiency — tank roof vent showing corrosion, bird screen damage, or frozen-open condition
visual_signals: corroded pressure-vacuum vent valve on tank roof
tank vent with damaged or missing bird screen mesh
vent valve on storage tank stuck in open position visible from ground

description: Flare pilot flame not visible — flare tip without visible pilot flame or ignition indication during operation
visual_signals: flare stack tip without visible flame during unit operation
flare header in service with no pilot or main flame at tip
dark flare stack top with no combustion visible during daytime

description: Flare stack structural deterioration — flare stack, derrick, or support structure showing corrosion, guy wire damage, or structural distress
visual_signals: heavy corrosion on flare stack structural members
flare stack guy wire frayed or showing broken strands
flare derrick member with visible section loss from corrosion

description: Flare exclusion zone not marked — area around flare stack base without radiation hazard or exclusion zone boundary markers
visual_signals: flare stack base area without exclusion zone fencing or signs
no radiation hazard warning signs near flare at ground level
flare stack perimeter without boundary markers or keep-out signage

description: Pressure relief valve discharge piping issue — PRV discharge pipe missing, undersized, or oriented to endanger personnel areas
visual_signals: pressure relief valve without discharge pipe directing release safely
PRV tail pipe aimed at walkway or personnel area
undersized or corroded discharge piping on pressure relief device

description: Pressure relief valve missing test tag — PRV without current test tag or nameplate showing last test date and set pressure
visual_signals: pressure relief valve without metal test tag attached
PRV with missing or illegible nameplate on body
relief valve lacking tag showing test date and set pressure

description: Pressure relief valve body corrosion — visible corrosion, paint loss, or deterioration on PRV body or bonnet
visual_signals: rust and corrosion on pressure relief valve body casting
paint flaking off PRV bonnet exposing corroded metal
heavy corrosion buildup around relief valve inlet flange

description: Pump coupling guard missing — rotating pump or compressor shaft coupling exposed without protective guard installed
visual_signals: pump motor and pump shaft coupling spinning without guard cover
exposed rotating coupling between motor and pump without shield
coupling guard removed and not reinstalled on operating pump

description: Compressor belt guard missing — V-belt or drive belt on compressor or fan rotating without protective guard enclosure
visual_signals: compressor drive belt spinning without mesh or solid guard
exposed V-belt and sheave on operating equipment
belt guard removed from compressor with rotating parts exposed

description: Fan shroud or guard missing — cooling fan, fin-fan cooler, or air handling equipment operating without protective shroud or guard
visual_signals: rotating fan blades visible without protective shroud installed
fin-fan cooler operating with fan guard removed or damaged
air handler fan accessible without screening or guard barrier

description: Pressure gauge unreadable or damaged — process pressure gauge with fogged lens, broken pointer, or scale too faded to read
visual_signals: pressure gauge with moisture-fogged glass lens obscuring reading
gauge with broken or bent pointer needle
pressure gauge dial with faded scale markings unreadable

description: Level glass damaged or obscured — sight glass or level gauge on vessel showing cracks, discoloration, or blockage preventing reading
visual_signals: sight glass on vessel with cracked or clouded glass tube
level gauge with stained or opaque glass preventing level reading
broken level indicator glass with leaking process fluid

description: Control valve position indicator missing or misaligned — control valve without position indicator or indicator not matching actual valve position
visual_signals: control valve actuator without position indicator arrow or scale
valve position indicator pointing at conflicting direction from stem
missing indicator plate on control valve actuator top

description: Improper electrical fixture in classified hazardous area — non-explosion-proof light, junction box, or equipment in Class I Division area
visual_signals: standard light fixture mounted in area with hazardous classification sign
non-explosion-proof junction box in Zone 1 or Division 1 area
regular electrical outlet or switch in classified hazardous location

description: Conduit seal missing in classified area — electrical conduit penetrating classified area boundary without required explosion-proof seal fitting
visual_signals: conduit passing through wall into hazardous area without seal fitting
unsealed conduit run between classified and unclassified zones
missing EYS or EYD seal fitting on conduit in hazardous area

description: Junction box open or damaged in hazardous area — junction box in classified location with missing cover, broken housing, or unsealed entries
visual_signals: open junction box cover in hazardous classified area
explosion-proof junction box with cracked housing
conduit entries into junction box without proper fittings in hazardous zone

description: Turnaround temporary equipment not properly secured — temporary hoses, blinds, or equipment staged during turnaround without proper tagging and securing
visual_signals: temporary hose connections in process area without identification tags
loose temporary equipment staged near operating units without securing
unmarked temporary blinds or blanks installed in piping without tags

description: Hose management violation — temporary hoses crossing walkways, unsecured, or creating trip hazards during turnaround or maintenance
visual_signals: temporary hose stretched across walkway without ramp or bridge
multiple hoses tangled on platform grating creating trip hazard
unsecured water or steam hose laying across pedestrian path

description: SIMOPS conflict — simultaneous operations creating incompatible hazards such as hot work adjacent to confined space entry or crane lifts over live equipment
visual_signals: welding activity occurring adjacent to open confined space entry
crane lifting load directly over operating process equipment
hot work and breaking containment activities in close proximity

description: Above-ground pipe support deterioration — pipe support shoe, saddle, or trunnion showing corrosion, displacement, or structural failure
visual_signals: corroded pipe support shoe with pipe sitting on deteriorated steel
pipe displaced from support saddle or guide
pipe support trunnion with visible cracking or weld failure

description: Expansion joint deterioration — bellows or slip-type expansion joint showing corrosion, leaking, or outer cover damage
visual_signals: bellows expansion joint with visible corrosion on convolutions
expansion joint with torn or missing outer protective cover
leaking at expansion joint bellows with staining on exterior

description: Cathodic protection test station damaged or inaccessible — CP test station post damaged, buried, or lacking readable identification
visual_signals: cathodic protection test station post knocked over or damaged
CP test post buried in vegetation and inaccessible for readings
test station with corroded terminals or missing identification label

description: Cooling tower drift eliminator deterioration — drift eliminators sagging, missing sections, or showing UV degradation
visual_signals: cooling tower drift eliminator panels sagging or displaced
missing sections of drift eliminator allowing visible water escape
UV-degraded and brittle drift eliminator material on tower

description: Cooling tower basin contamination — visible algae growth, sediment buildup, or debris accumulation in cooling tower basin
visual_signals: green algae growth visible in cooling tower collection basin
heavy sediment and sludge buildup on basin floor
debris and foreign material floating in cooling tower basin water

description: Cooling tower structural member deterioration — wooden, fiberglass, or concrete structural members showing rot, delamination, or cracking
visual_signals: wooden cooling tower structural member showing rot or decay
fiberglass tower member with delamination or fiber exposure
concrete cooling tower column with cracking and exposed rebar

description: Waste drum storage violation — drums stored without proper labeling, containment, or exceeding accumulation time limits
visual_signals: waste drums in storage area without labels or markings
drums stored on bare ground without secondary containment pallet
accumulation area with drums lacking hazardous waste labels and dates

description: Waste drum containment inadequate — drum storage area without secondary containment sufficient for largest container volume
visual_signals: multiple waste drums stored on ground without containment berm
drum storage area with cracked or leaking containment structure
drums outside designated containment area on unprotected surface

description: Waste drum integrity compromised — storage drums showing corrosion, dents, leaking, or damaged closures
visual_signals: corroded waste drum with rust holes or thinning walls
dented drum with compromised structural integrity
drum with leaking bung or lid allowing content to escape
